title: eurybia colensoi
intro: Eurybia colensoi, also known as Colenso's sea star, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Eurybia colensoi is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
